memoryArtifacts.headline: William de Eyton
memoryArtifacts.description:
BYU Film Number 355556
EGBERT GENEALOGY
Descendants of Egbert Sanderson Collateral Lines A-Z, This genealogy was Collected and organized in 5 volumes by Darrell Dwight Matthews.  Microfilmed May 1963.

zh.lifeSummary: 當George Eyton於大約1379年出生在英國史洛普爾艾頓 武朋 馮 維亞爾德 波斯時，他的父親Humphrey De Eyton25歲，母親Lady Jeanette de Eyton33歲。他於1396年與Lady Jane Brereton在英國爾馬爾帕斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1476年在他的家鄉享年99歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当George Eyton于大约1379年出生在英国史洛普爾艾頓 武朋 馮 維亞爾德 波斯时，他的父亲Humphrey De Eyton25岁，母亲Lady Jeanette de Eyton33岁。他于1396年与Lady Jane Brereton在英国爾馬爾帕斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1476年在他的家乡享年99岁。

nameMeanings.name: Eyton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Eyton (Shrops) or Eaton (Cheshire, Leics, Staffs), or Eaton Bray (Beds), Cold Eaton or Long Eaton (Derbys).

variants.name: Ayton
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from Ayton (North Yorkshire) or Ayton (Berwickshire). The former is derived from Old Norse á ‘river, stream’ + tūn ‘farmstead’. The later takes its name from the River Eye (likely from Old English ēa ‘river, stream’) + tūn ‘settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: George
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When George Eyton was born about 1379, in Eyton upon the Weald Moors, Shropshire, England, his father, Humphrey De Eyton, was 25 and his mother, Lady Jeanette de Eyton, was 33. He married Lady Jane Brereton in 1396, in Malpas, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died about 1476, in his hometown, at the age of 99.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque George Eyton est né environ 1379, à Eyton upon the Weald Moors, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Humphrey De Eyton, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Lady Jeanette d’Eyton, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Lady Jane Brereton en 1396, à Malpas, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé environ 1476, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 99 ans.

Er hat 1396 in Malpas, Cheshire, England Lady Jane Brereton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb um 1476 im Alter von 99 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

ja.lifeSummary: George Eytonが約1379年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアエイトン ウプオン ス ウエアルド ムールズで生まれた時，父Humphrey De Eytonは25歳，母Lady Jeanette de Eytonは33歳であった。1396年にイギリスチェシュアイアマルプアスでLady Jane Breretonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は約1476年に故郷で99歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: George Eyton(이)가 대략 1379년 영국 슈럽실르 이턴 업 테 위드 무르스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Humphrey De Eyton(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Jeanette de Eyton(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1396년 영국 체실르 맬파스에서 Lady Jane Brereton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1476년 그의 고향에서 99세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando George Eyton nasceu aproximadamente 1379, em Eyton upon the Weald Moors, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Humphrey De Eyton, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Lady Jeanette de Eyton, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Jane Brereton em 1396, em Malpas, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1476, em sua cidade natal, com 99 anos.

ru.Eyton upon the Weald Moors, Shropshire,: эитон упон т вилд мурс, шропшир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда George Eyton родился около 1379 г. в местности эитон упон т вилд мурс, шропшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Humphrey De Eyton было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Jeanette de Eyton, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Jane Brereton в 1396 г. в местности малпас, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер около 1476 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 99 лет.

Se casó con Lady Jane Brereton en 1396, en Malpas, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1476, en su pueblo, a la edad de 99 años.
